title: Gout Relief for Kidney Disease Patients with 7 Herbal Tinctures
description: Arctium lappa tinctures may help alleviate symptoms of gout due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant contains compounds like sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are known to reduce swelling and pain. These constituents also possess diuretic properties, which can help flush out uric acid crystals from the joints.
